title: SEC, Police Pledge to Forge Alliance against Illegal Schemes - FinancialEDGE
description: The Securities and Exchange Commission and the Nigeria Police Force have agreed to forge an alliance against illegal scheme operators, investment frauds, and cryptocurrency frauds in a bid to protect the hard-earned savings and the financial dreams of the Nigerian people. Director General of the SEC, Dr. Emomotimi Agama stated this during a meeting with
html: The Securities and Exchange Commission and the Nigeria Police Force have agreed to forge an alliance against illegal scheme operators, investment frauds, and cryptocurrency frauds in a bid to protect the hard-earned savings and the financial dreams of the Nigerian people.
